message:
fix: remove dead code in test builds for ipc.rs and native_events.rs

The cfg gates `any(not(feature = "asupersync-runtime"), test)` included
these functions in test builds but no tests called them, producing 4
dead-code warnings. Simplified to `not(feature = "asupersync-runtime")`.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
